title: Phan Thiet、Binh Thuan — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Phan Thiet、Binh Thuanの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Phan ThietはBinh Thuanにある人口350,000の都市です。Home to the famous Mui Ne sand dunes and a growing beach resort scene, this coastal city offers some of the most affordable beachfront living in Southeast Asia.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
